summary: Frontend-only testing of performance optimizations (React.lazy + Suspense code splitting). All 12 tests passed. Verified: Homepage loads with hero section, CTAs, trust badges; RFQ modal opens from 'Request a Quote' button; All lazy-loaded routes render correctly (/fabrics, /collections, /about-us, /tools, /blog, /sell); Admin login works (admin@locofast.com / admin123); Vendor login works (vendor@test.com / vendor123); Navigation between routes via navbar works; WhatsApp widget visible; No console errors related to lazy loading failures.
passed_tests: Homepage loads at / with hero section, headline, CTAs
Hero section has 'Instant Booking' and 'Request a Quote' buttons
Trust badges visible (500+ Seller Partners, Verified Suppliers, Money Safety Guarantee)
RFQ modal opens from 'Request a Quote' button
/fabrics page loads correctly (lazy-loaded FabricsPage)
/collections page loads correctly (lazy-loaded CollectionsPage)
/about-us page loads correctly (lazy-loaded AboutPage)
/tools page loads correctly (lazy-loaded ToolsPage)
/blog page loads correctly (lazy-loaded BlogPage)
/sell page loads correctly (lazy-loaded SellOnLocofast)
/admin/login page loads correctly (lazy-loaded AdminLogin)
Admin login flow works: admin@locofast.com / admin123 -> redirects to /admin dashboard
/vendor/login page loads correctly (lazy-loaded VendorLogin)
Vendor login flow works: vendor@test.com / vendor123 -> redirects to /vendor dashboard
Navigation Home -> Collections via navbar works
Navigation Collections -> About via navbar works
Navigation About -> Home via navbar works
Navigation Home -> Fabrics via 'Instant Booking' button works
WhatsApp chat widget visible on all pages (bottom-right corner)
No console errors related to lazy loading failures
No chunk loading errors during route transitions
critical_code_review_comments: React.lazy + Suspense implementation is correct - all route components except HomePage, Navbar, Footer are lazy-loaded
PageLoader fallback component is minimal and performant (inline styles, CSS animation)
Vendor routes have additional inner Suspense because VendorProtectedRoute is also lazy-loaded - correct pattern
Tools page uses named exports with .then(m => ({ default: m.ToolsPage })) pattern - correct for non-default exports
PostHog analytics deferred 3s after window.load - good for performance
Font loading uses media='print' swap pattern - good for CLS optimization
Minor: React warning 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' seen during admin login - non-blocking but should be investigated

test_credentials.note: info@palimills.com / admin@123 returned 401 - may need verification

context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance optimizations fully tested. All lazy-loaded routes work without blank screens or errors. Key routes tested: /, /fabrics, /collections, /about-us, /tools, /blog, /sell, /admin/login, /vendor/login. Admin and vendor login flows verified. WhatsApp widget (data-testid='whatsapp-chat-btn') visible on all pages. Previous iterations 21-23 also passed.

performance_optimizations_verified.code_splitting: React.lazy() + Suspense wrapping all Routes - WORKING
performance_optimizations_verified.image_optimization: loading='lazy', decoding='async', width/height on below-fold images - IMPLEMENTED
performance_optimizations_verified.font_optimization: media='print' swap pattern for Google Fonts - IMPLEMENTED
